title: Analytics - Help Guide Opened
scenario: Logs event when user opens Help Guide page, with event counts updating after a few hours and default analytics elements displayed.
steps: Wait for a few hours for event counts to update.

Check the default elements on the page: graph for the event, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
expected: The Help Guide page displays all default elements: graph for the event, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment. Event counts are updated after a few hours.
